title: lastrea divergens
intro: Lastrea divergens, also known as the Mountain Lady fern or Divergent Lady Fern, is a species of fern native to mountainous regions of the Himalayas and parts of Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Lastrea divergens include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health, making it a popular remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of Lastrea divergens include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed as teas, capsules, or applied topically for skin conditions.
